---
title: "Process Brysbaert et al.'s (2024) data"
author: "Ian Hussey"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
    highlight: haddock
    theme: flatly
    toc: yes
    toc_float: yes
---

```{r, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message=FALSE,
                      warning=FALSE)
```

# Dependencies

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

```

# Process

```{r}

library(tidyverse)

source("extract_brysbaert_functions.R")

out_dir <- file.path(dirname(base_dir), "processed")
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

write_csv(brysbaert_catalog, file.path(out_dir, "brysbaert_catalog.csv"))
write_csv(brysbaert_load_log, file.path(out_dir, "brysbaert_load_log.csv"))
write_csv(range_check, file.path(out_dir, "brysbaert_range_check.csv"))

range_check
brysbaert_load_log

library(arrow)

clean_sources <- brysbaert_load_log |>
  dplyr::mutate(prop_excluded = dplyr::if_else(
    is.na(n_total) | n_total == 0L, NA_real_, n_excluded / n_total
  )) |>
  dplyr::filter(ok, !is.na(prop_excluded), prop_excluded < 0.10) |>
  dplyr::pull(source) |>
  unique()

arrow::write_parquet(
  dplyr::filter(dat_brysbaert_sumscores, source %in% clean_sources),
  file.path(out_dir, "data_processed_brysbaert_sumscores.parquet")
)
clean_sources_short <- vapply(clean_sources, clean_source, character(1), USE.NAMES = FALSE)
arrow::write_parquet(
  dplyr::filter(dat_brysbaert_long, source %in% clean_sources_short),
  file.path(out_dir, "data_processed_brysbaert_itemlevel_long.parquet")
)

```

# Validate

```{r}

dat_brysbaert_sumscores <- read_parquet(file.path(out_dir, "data_processed_brysbaert_sumscores.parquet"))
dat_brysbaert_long      <- read_parquet(file.path(out_dir, "data_processed_brysbaert_itemlevel_long.parquet"))


# dat_brysbaert_sumscores |>
#   distinct(scale) |>
#   dput()
# 
# dat_brysbaert_long |>
#   distinct(scale) |>
#   dput()

dat_brysbaert_sumscores |>
  count(scale)

dat_brysbaert_long |>
  count(scale) 

head(dat_brysbaert_long)

# temp <- dat_brysbaert_long |>
#   slice_head(n = 10000) 


dat_brysbaert_long |>
  distinct(scale) |>
  count(name = "n_scales")

dat_brysbaert_long |>
  distinct(id, scale) |>
  count(scale, name = "n_participants")

dat_brysbaert_long |>
  group_by(scale, source) |>
  summarize(min = min(response),
            max = max(response)) 

dat_brysbaert_long |>
  group_by(scale, source) |>
  summarize(n = n(),
            min = min(response),
            max = max(response)) |>
  group_by(scale) |>
  mutate(range_consistent = n_distinct(min) == 1 & n_distinct(max) == 1)

dat_brysbaert_long |>
  group_by(scale, source) |>
  summarize(n = n(),
            min = min(response),
            max = max(response)) |>
  group_by(scale) |>
  mutate(range_consistent = n_distinct(min) == 1 & n_distinct(max) == 1) |>
  filter(!range_consistent)

```
